requirements.summary: Partner Agency Portal end-to-end: Maria (Latino community center pantry lead) submits a food request from the Experience Cloud portal at 9am Monday; Devon's transcription work disappears; by Tuesday morning Carla's distribution plan dashboard already shows the request mapped to a specific truck route and warehouse pull list. Replaces today's email-to-Google-Sheet loop with 5-10 day lead time. Includes Devon's 'transcription robot' pain.
requirements.source_quote: The "wow" is supposed to be: a partner submits a request at 9am Monday, and by Tuesday morning Carla's distribution plan dashboard already shows the request mapped to a specific truck route and warehouse pull list.

requirements.summary: Volunteer Shift Self-Service with no-show auto-case: Jordan signs in to the same Experience Cloud portal (Customer Community license), views and reschedules upcoming shifts; when a volunteer no-shows, a Case is auto-created and routed to Devon. Replaces the Google Form + printed sign-in sheet + Devon's mental model triple-source today, and replaces the manual Tuesday outreach that eats his week (15-20% no-show rate).
requirements.source_quote: They want volunteers to sign up via the same portal as partners (different user license), see their upcoming shifts, cancel/reschedule themselves, and have no-shows automatically create a case for Devon to follow up.

requirements.summary: Distribution Planning Dashboard (NPSP Reports + Dashboard, NOT Tableau): single Monday-morning view showing pounds pledged by category, open partner requests, unfilled volunteer slots, and a map of distribution routes. Replaces Carla's 90-minute Excel rebuild every Monday so she walks in and immediately knows if she is short on protein for Thursday.
requirements.source_quote: I want to walk in Monday morning, look at one screen, and know if I'm short on protein for Thursday.

requirements.summary: Donor Receipt Automation: personalized gift-level acknowledgments for gifts >$250. Customer flagged this as lower priority and aspirational — not in scope for this 30-minute demo.
requirements.source_quote: Lower priority — Carla mentioned it but didn't flag pain. Probably aspirational, not must-demo.

requirements.summary: Tableau / advanced analytics layer on top of distribution data. Customer explicitly shelved for this engagement; out of scope.
requirements.source_quote: Tableau / advanced analytics (Carla mentioned but shelved)
